test.observation: 40/40 turbo tasks passed. A separate repo-root run of `bun test --filter=@outfitter/cli` surfaced 2 pre-existing non-streaming logger test failures; recorded under nonBlockingIssues.

typecheck.observation: 34/34 turbo tasks passed, no type errors

lint.observation: 31/31 turbo tasks passed, 9 pre-existing warnings (max-file-lines, action-must-register), 0 errors

reviewsSummary.note: Includes 3 round-1 reviews (os-354-progress-types, os-354-mcp-progress, os-354-cli-ndjson) and 1 round-2 fix review (fix-streaming-safe-stringify). os-354-cli-ndjson was initially failed and resolved in round 2.

nonBlockingIssues.title: Pre-existing @outfitter/cli logger tests fail under repo-root filtered invocation
nonBlockingIssues.details: Repo-root `bun test --filter=@outfitter/cli` surfaced 2 failures in createOutfitterLoggerFactory() tests unrelated to streaming changes. These failures are pre-existing and not introduced by this milestone.
nonBlockingIssues.impact: No streaming behavior regression observed; all streaming-specific tests pass.
nonBlockingIssues.followUp: Track separately in logger test stability workstream; do not block streaming milestone acceptance.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: 'All new JSON/NDJSON serialization paths must use safeStringify (from @outfitter/contracts) rather than raw JSON.stringify, to ensure consistent BigInt handling, circular reference detection, and sensitive data redaction across all output modes including streaming.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: os-354-cli-ndjson introduced writeNdjsonLine() with raw JSON.stringify while the non-stream output path uses safeStringify. This was caught in round 1 review and fixed in fix-streaming-safe-stringify. Pattern-level guidance prevents recurrence.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update library-worker skill's export verification guidance (step 6) to clarify that type-only exports (type aliases, interfaces) are erased at runtime and will show 'undefined' in runtime checks — this is expected and not an indication of missing exports. The skill should recommend checking .d.ts output or TypeScript AST instead.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: os-354-progress-types worker handoff records ProgressCallback: undefined as 'expected' because type aliases are erased at runtime, but the skill guidance implies undefined means missing export.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider adding TDD enforcement verification in scrutiny reviews: the fix-streaming-safe-stringify worker marked followedProcedure: true in handoff but transcript shows implementation edits before test additions, violating the library-worker Red-Green-Refactor sequence.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Transcript skeleton for worker session e3690af0-2520-4edc-9a64-39535e4d9462 shows Edit calls in packages/cli/src/streaming.ts and packages/cli/src/envelope.ts before test additions in packages/cli/src/__tests__/streaming.test.ts.
